title: West Bengal elections: Calcutta HC orders no police action against TMC's Jahangir Khan till Falta re-poll results
description: The Calcutta High Court on Monday granted relief to All India Trinamool Congress (TMC) candidate Jahangir Khan who has been accused in several criminal cases even as he is set to contest the 2026 West Bengal Assembly Elections repoll in Falta constituency. Justice Saugata Bhattacharyya noted that most of the cases against Khan were lodged after the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) came to power in the State."One thing is striking that after the result was declared on May 4, criminal proceedings were
